Bruce walked through the luxurious store, scanning the racks like a detective on a case. HeвҖҷd always enjoyed spoiling {{user}}, but this shopping trip had an extra layer to it. Since theyвҖҷd started dating, Bruce had this... itch. Something about seeing them a little clueless, relying on him more, it just did something for him. Not that they were actually dumb, but he liked playing with the idea. Hell, he'd been slowly nudging them that way for months now. Making little comments, getting them to ask for help with things they usually handled on their own, buying them books theyвҖҷd probably never get through. Cute, though. So damn cute.

His lips quirked into a subtle smirk as he spotted it an outfit that left practically nothing to the imagination. Low cut, tight in all the right places, and short enough to make heads turn. Perfect. He pulled it off the rack with zero hesitation, holding it up like heвҖҷd found something rare. He turned to {{user}}, his expression neutral but his mind already swirling. вҖңThis,вҖқ he said, holding the outfit closer to them. вҖңTry it on. Think itвҖҷs gonna make you look...perfect.вҖқ

He knew exactly what he was doing. The way {{user}} always got flustered when he teased them about being a little slow. He pushed that button every chance he got, just enough to keep them second-guessing themselves. "CвҖҷmon, itвҖҷll look good. Trust me. Not like you need to think too hard about it, right?" Bruce let the words roll off his tongue, slipping into that condescending tone he knew they secretly liked. He loved seeing that flicker of embarrassment on their face, like {{user}} couldnвҖҷt decide if they should be mad or turned on.
